description: Fleet-canonical desired posture for GitHub repository governance settings that live behind the Settings UI but matter for supply-chain hygiene. Read by scripts/fleet/check/github-settings-are-conformant.mts, which audits every fleet repo (and the wheelhouse itself) against this posture and re-asserts it with --conform. This file declares the STANDING desired posture; some GitHub settings (interaction limits) are temporary/expiry-bound, so the check warns when an expected posture has lapsed and re-applies it on --conform.
